title: [Origin Realms] Paper Crops
description: A performance resourcepack that changes the detailed model of the crops for a flat one
body:
THIS RESOURCEPACK NEEDS [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)

Changes the detailed model of the custom crops for a simpler one where you can easily see their current growing stage, if you have a slow pc this simpler model will improve your game's performance

(the orientation of the textures depends on the angle in which you place the planter box, if you want them to be perfectly aligned as in the image you would have to align the planter boxes first, this is something that unfortunately can not be changed with a resourcepack, at least not as far as I know, if someone knows a way to do it let me know please)
